business.headline: Reliance Q4 profit slips to Rs 16,971 crore; Rs 6 dividend announcedReliance Industries posted consolidated net profit attributable to owners of Rs 16,971 crore for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, down from Rs 19,407 crore a year earlier.

Is not using your credit card doing more harm than good?For many people, the safest way to avoid debt is simple, i.e., stop using credit cards altogether. No swipes, no bills, no worries. But could this seemingly smart move actually be harming your credit score?

How this 25-year old built a Rs 20 lakh portfolio in almost 3 yearsBuilding a Rs 20 lakh portfolio usually feels like a long-term goal. But a 25-year-old techie managed to do it in just about three years. The surprising part? His salary wasn't very high, so what did he do differently?

Should you pause your SIP when markets fall? Here's the truth most investors missThe moment markets dip, doubt creeps in. That steady SIP (Systematic Investment Plan) you trusted now feels risky. Should you stop and play safe for a while? The answer isn't as obvious as it seems.

Row at Darling re-release show: Fan beaten with slippers, sticks. Viral videos The re-release of Prabhas' Darlings sparked a row after a man was beaten with sticks and slippers at a Hyderabad theatre. Several videos from the altercations have emerged online.

Prabhas' Darling records 2nd biggest Telugu re-release debut, earns Rs 7.59 crore Prabhas and Kajal Aggarwal's Darling has returned to theatres with its 4K re-release, with a smashing opening globally. The film now stands as the second-biggest Telugu re-release opener after Baahubali: The Epic.

US's Iran talks plan: Kushner, Witkoff will head to Pak, Vance to be on standbyVice President JD Vance is not expected to travel along with Witkoff and Kushner. However, officials say he remains on standby and could travel to Pakistan if negotiations gain traction, CNN reported.

The silence broke 22 days later when he walked out and merged with the BJP along with six others. Raghav Chadha didn't just respond to his demotion. He outmanoeuvred it. He flipped the script. Completely.

We sail or sink together: NSA Ajit Doval meets eminent Indian MuslimsNational Security Adviser Ajit Doval invited 14 eminent people from the Muslim community to the new PMO building. Doval heard their concerns and suggestions, and spoke about the path for a stronger and united India.

Why Israel is airlifting this 'lost tribe' from India's northeastFar from the Middle East, Israel undertook a silent mission in India. Announced last year by Benjamin Netanyahu, Israel on Thursday airlifted around 250 members of the Bnei Menashe community as part of its Operation Wings of Dawn.

How Babur used village homes as a shield in the Battle of PanipatIt has been 500 years since the first Battle of Panipat was fought, and it is remembered mainly for the first use of cannons in India, and the beginning of the Mughal empire. However, some literature suggests that the conquest was built not only on gunpowder and cavalry, but on civilians caught between his and Ibrahim Lodi's armies.

Live: Trump likely to send Kushner, Witkoff to Islamabad for Iran talksUS-Iran War Live Updates: The situation in the Middle East remains tense as military activity and diplomatic efforts continue at the same time. The USS George HW Bush has arrived in the region, increasing the number of US aircraft carriers in operation there to three. Donald Trump has stated that any deal with Iran will be made only when it is "appropriate and good" for the United States. Iranian leaders, including President Masoud Pezeshkian, Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf and judiciary chief Gholamhossein Mohseni Ejei, have rejected claims that there are divisions within the country's leadership. The US has taken further military steps. The US President has ordered the Navy to "shoot and kill" Iranian boats suspected of placing mines in the Strait of Hormuz. The US military has also intensified mine-clearing operations in the waterway. In addition, the Pentagon said US forces boarded the tanker Majestic X in the Indian Ocean. These developments come after the US extended a ceasefire with Iran, although there is no formal extension or confirmed timeline for further talks. Diplomatic efforts are continuing alongside military developments. The United States is hosting a second round of talks between Israel and Lebanon in Washington. The discussions are focused on extending a ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah. Both sides have carried out strikes during the truce period. So far, there is no clear deadline for ending the conflict or for reaching a new agreement. Catch all the live updates at indiatoday.in.

The Secret Seven who left AAP high and dryRaghav Chadha, who had been with the AAP since its inception, and six Rajya Sabha MPs dealt a big blow to the party ahead of the 2027 Punjab Assembly elections by merging with the BJP.

What makes this 100-year-old Parsi bakery in Pune so specialNo one was lying when they said old school charm rules. This century-old bakery has no artisanal desserts. They have no Gen Z vibe at all. And that's exactly their aesthetic that brings customers from across the city.
